cases.title: Verify user can create a new Instagram account with valid data
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that a new user can successfully create an Instagram account using valid registration data and access the application after sign up.

**Steps to reproduce :** 

1. Open instagram
2. Press “Sign up”
3. Enter valid email/phone number
4. Enter full name
5. Create username
6. Create valid password
7. Press “Create account”

**Expected result :** A new Instagram account is successfully created.
cases.preconditions: Email/phone number is not already registered.

cases.title: Login with the correct credentials.
cases.description:
**Description :** Check if the login works when a person uses a correct user and pass .

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open Instagram
2. Enter valid username
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login button

**Expected result :** User should be able to login and is taken to his profile page.

**Test data :** User : jacksparrow07

                   Pass : iliketotravel

cases.title: Login with "Remember me"
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the “Remember me” option keeps the user logged in.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open Instagram
2. Login with the correct credentials
3. Check "Remember me"
4. Press Login button

**Expected result :** After you check remember me, your login data will be saved and next time you want to log in it will happen automatically.

**Test data :** User : jacksparrow07

                   Pass : iliketotravel

cases.title: Verify user can logout successfully
cases.description:
**Description :** Logout of the application then login with the correct credentials.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open Instagram
2. Press logout
3. Login with the correct credentials
4. Press Login button

**Expected result :** User is logged in successfully.

cases.title: Sign up with existing email
cases.description:
### **Description :**

Verify that the user cannot create an account using an email already registered on Instagram.

**Steps to reproduce :** 

1. Open instagram
2. Press "Sign up"
3. Enter an already registered email address.
4. Press "Create account"

**Expected result :** An error message is displayed and the account is not created.
cases.preconditions: An account with this email already exists.

cases.title: Sign up with weak password
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot create an account using a weak password.

**Steps to reproduce :** 

1. Open instagram
2. Press "Sign up"
3. Enter a weak password
4. Press "Create account"

**Expected result :** A warning or validation message is displayed indicating that the password is too weak.

cases.title: Sign up with invalid email format
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot create an account using an invalid email format.

**Steps to reproduce :** 

1. Open instagram
2. Press "Sign up"
3. Enter an invalid email
4. Enter full name
5. Create username
6. Create a password
7. Press "Create account"

**Expected result :** An error with invalid email should appear.

cases.title: Sign up with empty mandatory fields
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot create an account when mandatory fields are left empty.

**Steps to reproduce :** 

1. Open instagram
2. Press "Sign up"
3. Enter a valid email
4. Enter a valid password
5. Do not fill in other mandatory fields
6. Press "Create account"

**Expected result :** The account has not been created and error messages are displayed for the required fields.

cases.title: Login with invalid password
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot log in with an incorrect password.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open instagram
2. Enter valid username
3. Enter invalid password
4. Press "Login"

**Expected result :** Error message is displayed and user is not logged in.

**Test data :**

Valid user : jacksparrow

Invalid password : wrongpass123

cases.title: Login with invalid username
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot log in with an incorrect username.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open instagram
2. Enter invalid username
3. Enter valid password
4. Press "Login"

**Expected result :**  Error message is displayed and user is not logged in.

**Test data :**

invalid username : wronguser

valid password : iliketotravel

cases.title: Login with empty fields
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user cannot log in when the required fields are left empty.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open instagram
2. Leave the username field empty
3. Leave the password field empty
4. Press "Login"

**Expected result :**  Error message is displayed and user is not logged in.

cases.title: Verify "forgot password" functionality
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify that the user can access the password recovery page using the “Forgot Password” option.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open instagram
2. Click "Forgot password ?"
3. Enter a registered email
4. Click "Send login link"

**Expected result :** A password recovery link or reset instructions are sent successfully to the user.
